arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy set to be appointed Leicester boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to be appointed as Leicester City's new boss, replacing Steve Cooper, who was sacked earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham are sending scouts to watch tonight’s Europa League clash between FC Midtjylland and Eintracht Frankfurt and will be joined by Leicester City. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who report that Manchester United, Tottenham and Leicester will all have representatives in Central Jutland to watch the European clash. They explain that several clubs The post Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Preview: Brentford vs. Leicester City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Brentford and Leicester City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Brentford lineup vs. Leicester: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Brentford could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Leicester lineup vs. Brentford: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Leicester City could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Brentford.

arts.ttl: Leicester City make manager decision for Brentford fixture
arts.sum: Leicester City first-team coach Ben Dawson will take charge of the club at Brentford this weekend with Ruud van Nistelrooy’s first game to come next week. The club had hoped to have a new permanent manager in charge, but with Van Nistelrooy still not announced, the interim coaching team will be in the dugout in west London.

arts.ttl: Why Ruud van Nistelrooy can save Leicester after wowing Man United's players - and the first thing he needs to get rid of
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AND TOM COLLOMOSSE: Ask around Man United about Ruud van Nistelrooy the coach and endorsements quickly come rolling in. 'He's obsessed,' is how one source put it.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has 'chip on his shoulder' but brave Leicester City gamble backed
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is expected to be named as the new Leicester City boss, and could be in post in time for the next game at Brentford this weekend - and some Leicestershire Live readers in our comments section are feeling much more positive about the pick than some pundits. Yes. It seems every time Leicester appoint a new manager the pundits say they are taking a chance.

arts.ttl: Leicester City plight plunges Ruud van Nistelrooy into unknown territory after five-month twist - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Five months ago, when Leicester City were seeking a successor to Enzo Maresca, Ruud van Nistelrooy was not under consideration. Maybe Premier League experience, of which Van Nistelrooy only has a smidgen, is no longer a key factor, although Graham Potter and David Moyes were asked the question in the immediate wake of Cooper’s sacking.
